== Notes for [[Item:Q114603|Q114603]] ==

http://www.sologenealogia.com/gen/getperson.php?personID=I2564&tree=001

Sancho III of Navarre

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Succession

Besides four legitimate sons by Mayor, Sancho also fathered one by his mistress Sancha de Aybar named Ramiro, who was the eldest of his sons but, as a bastard, not entitled to succeed.

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11195

Sancha de Aybar wasn't his wife, just his lover while he was an unmarried prince.

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
